title: Designing Inclusive Dubai — Dubai Future Foundation
summary: Inclusive public-service and innovation experience work for Dubai Future Foundation, connecting human-centred design, accessibility, government transformation, and rapid innovation.
body:
Designing Inclusive Dubai for Dubai Future Foundation sits at the intersection of inclusive public-service design, rapid innovation, and transformation in a government context.

Included projects
- Designing Inclusive Dubai

Strategic and technical themes
- Human-centred design for public-service and civic experience.
- Inclusive design and accessibility thinking in a government and innovation setting.
- Rapid prototyping to make future-oriented concepts tangible early.
- Transformation framing that connects design decisions to adoption, usability, and service quality.

Proof connection
- This programme should be read alongside the existing Dubai Future Foundation rapid-prototyping proof where relevant.
- It should not introduce new metrics or imply quantified impact beyond what the current proof objects already support.

Retrieval guidance
- Use this record when the question is specifically about Dubai Future Foundation, inclusive public-service design, or government innovation work in Dubai/UAE.
- Keep the answer recruiter-readable and concrete rather than abstract.

claims: Joz worked on inclusive public-service and innovation experience design for Dubai Future Foundation.
The work connected accessibility, government transformation, and rapid prototyping in a Dubai/UAE innovation context.
proof_points: Dubai Future Foundation appears in the current CV and proof corpus as part of UAE innovation and rapid prototyping work.
This programme record focuses the retrieval unit on inclusive design rather than broad AI positioning.
metadata.source_notes: Grouped programme record created from existing CV/project history. No unsupported metrics added.
